note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. rosanna-chic-ocean (Rosanna: Chic Ocean, AR/Wind/Supporter/B2) — parts-support BUFFER; most of her kit value (both Damage-to-Parts buffs + the part-destroy ATK stacks) is INERT vs the partless scope-lock boss, so she is EXPECTED to look weak here (faithful, not a bug). MODELED: S1a battle-start allies partsDamagePct 24.26 ×15s (inert v1, kept for fidelity/future parts consumer). S2a allies partsDamagePct 24.26 ×15s (inert; kit text gives NO activation clause for skill2 — see ⚑2). S2b maintained sustained DoT on the boss: 70.4% caster ATK/s — encoded per the DoT-overlap hard rule as ONE passive instance dur 999 (continuous steady-state; the printed 15s duration + an unprinted re-activation cadence ⇒ maintained, NOT a stacking per-trigger DoT which would multiply ~overlap-fold). FB on DoT ticks = by timing (default, no noFb). Burst (burstCast): allies sustainedDamagePct 20.32 ×10s (feeds DoT teammates + her own S2 DoT) + boss damageTakenPct 32.23 ×10s (big team lever — blast radius is TEAM-WIDE, sim-battery diff before board claims). SKIPPED→unmodeled: S1b part-destroy ATK stacks (trigger 'destroys an enemy's part' NEVER fires vs the partless boss — genuinely-skippable class; ⚑3 BIG lever vs parts bosses: casterAtkPct 3×5=15 to ALL allies; NOTE this REMOVES the previous override's optimistic permanent 15% casterAtkPct encoding, which its own note flagged as an over-count). ⚑1 cadence tuple: AR pulls/s + reloadFrames 81 + rolling-reload unverified (datamine estimate; no text tell of a special fire mode — 60 ammo empties in ~5s at class rate, plausible). ⚑2 S2 activation/uptime: skill2 has NO 'Activates…' clause in the kit text — the passive-continuous (100% uptime) encoding is an INVENTED trigger; if real activation has gaps (e.g. gated on attacking/charge), the DoT and the S2 parts buff over-count proportionally. ⚑3 part-destroy stacks (above). Prior-2: no noFb anywhere; burst buffs are buffs (no snapshot issue).

skill1: ■ Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 3% of the skill user's ATK, stacks up to 5, 30s.

caveats: skill1: part-destroy ATK stacks (3% caster ATK ×5 to all allies) are inert vs a partless boss and NOT modeled — big hidden lever on parts bosses
skill2: sustained DoT modeled as 100%-uptime maintained (one passive instance) — the kit text prints no activation clause; real uptime is unmeasured
skill1/skill2: Damage to Parts ▲ 24.26% buffs are inert vs the partless boss (kept for fidelity)
